steps.action: Run preset add with name and query
steps.expected: Exit code 0, JSON with preset details
steps.observed: Exit code 0, JSON with name, query, createdAt, updatedAt, detectedParameters

steps.expected: JSON includes all fields, active: true when --use used
steps.observed: All fields present: name, query, description, connection, maxRows, parameters, tags, createdAt, updatedAt. active: true

result.description: Complete preset test with all fields
result.name: g6-complete-preset

assertions.title: Preset Add - Missing Required Field

steps.expected: Exit code 1, error with code MISSING_REQUIRED_FIELD in JSON
steps.observed: Exit code 1, but error is Cobra CLI framework error not in JSON format. Error message: 'required flag(s) "query" not set'

assertions.issues: Cobra required flag errors are not wrapped in the application's JSON error envelope. The error should include code MISSING_REQUIRED_FIELD but instead returns Cobra's default error format.

assertions.title: Preset Add - Duplicate Name

steps.action: Run preset add with existing name
steps.expected: Error with code PRESET_EXISTS, hint about edit command
steps.observed: ok: false, error.code: PRESET_EXISTS, error.hint suggests using 'preset edit'

error.hint: Use 'mapj protheus preset edit g6-basic-test' to modify the existing preset

assertions.issues: Exit code is 0 instead of 1 for errors. This may be intentional for LLM-friendly output (always exit 0, check ok field).

steps.action: Run preset add with invalid --param-def type
steps.expected: Error with code INVALID_PARAM_DEF, correct format in hint
steps.observed: ok: false, error.code: INVALID_PARAM_DEF, error.hint shows correct format, error.message lists valid types

error.message: invalid --param-def format: invalid type 'invalidtype', valid types: string, int, date, datetime, bool, list
error.hint: Format: name:type[:default][:description] (types: string, int, date, datetime, bool, list)

steps.expected: Exit code 0, JSON with presets array and count
steps.observed: ok: true, count: 14, presets array with all preset details

steps.expected: Only presets with matching tag in output
Only presets with matching connection in output
steps.observed: count: 2, only presets with connection: 'protheus_prod' returned

summary: Tested 9 assertions: 8 passed, 1 failed (VAL-CLI-003: Cobra required flag errors not wrapped in JSON envelope). Note: Application errors return exit code 0 instead of 1, which may be intentional for LLM-friendly output. Cleanup completed: removed g6-basic-test and g6-complete-preset presets.
